zh.lifeSummary: 當Marion Crichton於1464年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾時，她的父親Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar22歲，母親Christian Erskine24歲。她於1469年之後與Malcolm Crawford在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1494年在她的家鄉享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marion Crichton于1464年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾时，她的父亲Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar22岁，母亲Christian Erskine24岁。她于1469年之后与Malcolm Crawford在英国苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1494年在她的家乡享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Marion Crichton was born in 1464, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar, was 22 and her mother, Christian Erskine, was 24. She married Malcolm Crawford after 1469, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1494, in her hometown, at the age of 30.

fr.Skirling, Peebles-shire, Scotland: Skirling, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marion Crichton est née en 1464, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Christian Erskine, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Malcolm Crawford après 1469, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1494, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marion Crichton 1464 in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar 22 und ihre Mutter Christian Erskine 24. Sie hat nach 1469 in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Malcolm Crawford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1494 im Alter von 30 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Crichton è nata il nel 1464 nel Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Christian Erskine, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Malcolm Crawford dopo il 1469, nel Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1494, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion Crichtonが1464年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーで生まれた時，父Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquharは22歳，母Christian Erskineは24歳であった。1469年以後にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーでMalcolm Crawfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1494年に故郷で30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion Crichton(이)가 1464년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Erskine(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1469년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 Malcolm Crawford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1494년 그녀의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marion Crichton nasceu em 1464, em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Christian Erskine, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Malcolm Crawford após 1469, em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1494, em sua cidade natal, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marion Crichton родилась в 1464 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Christian Erskine, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Malcolm Crawford после 1469 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1494 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marion Crichton nació en 1464, en Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Crichton 1st Lord Sanquhar, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Christian Erskine, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Malcolm Crawford después de 1469, en Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1494, en su pueblo, a la edad de 30 años.
